evidence-binding: n2-stale-culprits 4f33a1ba17b5
upstream_read: n1-explore 51876192226e

assigned_task: n2-stale-culprits
goal_line: Implement the additive `chains_stale` diagnostic fields without changing the refusal decision; compute clean resolvable stale paths, classify via validation visibility/testConsumes, cap emitted paths, and degrade to the existing generic refusal on uncertainty.

write_set:
- scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js
- plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-plan-validator.js
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-plan-validator.js
- scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js

tests_changed:
- scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js
  - added clean-stamped code stale assertion for `stale_kind: "code"` and `stale_paths: ["newcode.js"]`
  - added validation-consumed prose stale assertion for `stale_kind: "prose-only"`
  - added mixed code/prose stale assertion for `stale_kind: "mixed"`
  - kept inert-doc pass coverage and added unresolvable-head / dirty-stamp generic-degrade assertions

implementation_files_changed:
- scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js
  - added best-effort `chains_stale` diagnostics gated on `receipt.headSha` and `receipt.workTreeHash === "clean"`
  - computes `git diff <receipt.headSha> --name-only` plus `git ls-files --others --exclude-standard`
  - filters with `!isValidationInvisible(path, project, receipt.validationTestConsumes)`
  - classifies with `testConsumes` into `prose-only`, `code`, or `mixed`
  - caps `stale_paths` at 20 and sets `stale_paths_truncated` only when applicable
  - preserves `reason: "chains_stale"` and existing exit behavior
- plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-plan-validator.js
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-plan-validator.js
  - generated by `npm run sync:editions`

RED: `node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js` before implementation exited 1.
failing_signature: `#547 (d): a code commit after the chains ran must refuse chains_stale with code stale_paths`
pre_impl_output_shape: `{"result":"refuse","reason":"chains_stale",...,"errors":[...]}`
missing_pre_impl_fields: `stale_paths`, `stale_kind`

GREEN: `node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js` after implementation exited 0.
green_signature: `Workflow walkthrough simulation passed`

validation_commands:
- `npm run sync:editions` -> exit 0; generated GitLab/Gitea validator ports and synced Codex validator port
- `node scripts/edition-sync.js --check` -> exit 0; edition-sync parity confirmed
- `node scripts/validate-script-sync.js` -> exit 0; common script and byte-identical groups in sync
- `npm run test:kaola-workflow:claude && npm run test:kaola-workflow:codex && npm run test:kaola-workflow:gitlab && npm run test:kaola-workflow:gitea` -> exit 0; all four edition chains green

failure_classification: none
